review_text: These headphones sound amazing and the battery lasts all day. Highly recommend for the price.
These headphones sound amazing and the battery lasts all day. Highly recommend for the price.
Sound quality is good but I expected more given the price point. Comfortable for long sessions though.
Left ear stopped working after 8 days. Support was slow to respond. Disappointed.
This blender crushes ice like butter and cleanup is a breeze. Worth every penny.
It is quite loud but gets the job done quickly. Smoothies come out perfectly smooth.
Mine started leaking liquid from the base after two weeks of light use. Returning it.
Gripping plot from start to finish, the character development in the second half really pulled me in and kept me reading late into the night.
Took about 100 pages to get interesting but the payoff was worth it in the end.
Ce livre n'était pas pour moi, je n'ai pas aimé le style d'écriture du tout.
Enjoyed most of it but the twist was easy to guess halfway through the book.

Arrived with two dead pixels in the corner. Otherwise picture quality is nice.
